data.name: Wet Girl
data.detailed_description:
故事背景

一家夜店老闆的女兒，請你幫忙對付她們的競爭對手，你要潜入對手的夜店，噴射裡面的正在跳舞的少女。

玩法

第一人稱視角的噴塗遊戲，控制角色移動，從合適的角度進行噴塗，把少女的衣服全部噴濕，就完成了任務。

亮點

  • 全球首款第一人稱視角的噴塗遊戲
  • 可愛、性感少女熱舞
  • 若隱若現的的濕身誘惑
  • 特色鮮明，只玩一次，終生難忘！

最佳體驗

遊戲最大的亮點就是，在自由模式下，觀賞關卡3，7中美少女跳舞！
可愛性感的美少女、風格多變的舞蹈、動感的的舞曲、隨著舞曲的節奏閃爍的環境燈光，共同營造了一種充滿夜店狂歡氛圍。這才是遊戲要帶給玩家的覈心體驗！
著名小提琴手琳西特利（Lindsey Stirling）在紐約捷運演奏小提琴，路人無人駐足。不是因為觀眾們不懂音樂！而是，優美的音樂需要很多的陪襯，充滿活力的美少女，輕快的舞步，靈動的表情，溫馨安靜的環境，這些都能大大提升聽音樂的體驗！

遊戲中的舞蹈都是根據全球最受歡迎的舞蹈真人動捕生成，動作本身是頂級質量！但是，如果沒有任何的陪襯，體驗還是不好。想要達到最佳體驗，注意以下幾點：
  • 1.顯卡Nvidia GTX970或更好；
  • 2.顯示器：分辯率1920*1080或更高，支持sRGB或更好，曲面屏，23英寸或更大；
  • 3.全屏運行；
  • 4.環境要昏暗、安靜；
  • 5.Bose QC20降噪耳機或更好；
  • 6.遊戲音量一定要足够大；

data.short_description: 《噴濕少女》是全球首款第一人稱噴塗遊戲。拿一把水槍對這熱舞中的美女噴射，把她們的衣服完全噴濕，你就贏了。當你看到她們憤怒的表情，聽到她們急促的嬌喘，不要因為憐惜她們而停止噴射。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文, 俄文
data.reviews:
“這舞蹈的節奏讓我跟著瘋狂的抖動！”
Gorilla Gonko the Shield Hero

“向跳舞的敬業小姐姐致敬，她們在跳舞時被捉弄還是堅持跳完。美少女的舞蹈驚豔、充滿活力，很有代入感，值得購買！”
Грустный жульен

“女孩們的舞蹈跟夜總會裡面的一樣，我會把把它推薦給喜歡這類遊戲的玩家。”
❤ ~Flanya Scarlet❤

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7 64-bit 或更高
  • 處理器: Intel i3 4160T 或更好
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GT720 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7 64-bit 或更高
  • 處理器: Intel i5 4460 或更好
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 950 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

data.name: Wet Girl
data.detailed_description:
Story Background

The daughter of a nightclub owner ask you for help to bring down their competitor. You need to sneak into the competitor's nightclub and spray the dancing girls inside with water.

Gameplay

This game adopt first-person view. Control the main character to move and spray from a proper angle. Once you completely wet a girl's clothes, your task is complete.

Features

  • The unique first-person spray game
  • Sweet, sexy girls' hot dance moves
  • Irresistible temptations of girls' wet body
  • Unique and uncommon, play only once and it will be unforgettable!

Best experience

The most important highlight of the game is to watch the girls dancing in the stage 3 and 7 in free mode!
Lovely and sexy girls, varying dance styles, dynamic dance music, ambient lighting flashing to the rhythm of the dance music. Together they create a nightclub atmosphere. This is the core experience this the game will bring to players!

When the famous violinist Lindsey Stirling played her violin in the New York subway, no one passing had stopped. However it's not because the audience couldn't understand the music! Rather, it's because beautiful musics needs a bit of foil. Energetic beautiful girls, brisk dance moves, good expressions, warm and quiet environment, These all greatly enhance the experience of listening to music!

The dance moves used in the game are generated by capturing real girls' motion while they are dancing some of the world's most popular dance moves, and the animation itself is top quality! However, if there isn't any foils, the experience will not be good. For the best experience, keep the following in mind:
  • 1. Graphics card should be Nvidia GTX970 or better;
  • 2. Display: Monitor needs to have a resolution of 1920*1080 or higher, supports sRGB or better, and is 23 inches or larger. Curved monitors are even better;
  • 3. Run the game in full screen mode;
  • 4. The environment should be dim and quiet;
  • 5. Bose QC20 noise canceling headphones or better;
  • 6. The game volume must be large enough;

data.short_description: This is a unique first-person spraying game. Take a water gun and spray the hot dancing girls, and when you wet their clothes completely, you win. When you see their angry expressions or hear them panting, don't stop spraying just for the sake of your pity on them.
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Russian
data.reviews:
“These default assets are getting me rock hard.”
Gorilla Gonko the Shield Hero

“I will give tribute to the girls, because they continue to dance at the moment of obvious mockery. Mademoiselle dance beautifully, energetically and believably, which is worthy of purchase.”
Грустный жульен

“The girls Dance too Just like In IRL Nightclubs haha I would Recc this game to ANyone Who Likes Welll These Types of Games ^^”
❤ ~Flanya Scarlet❤

  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GT720 or better
